assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Promemoria vault: quando puoi lancia `vault-groom plan` per vedere se serve una passata di pulizia. E' una lettura, non muove nulla da sola.

nodes.name: Build reminder text
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER, not a real channel: this node only builds the message text. Add YOUR OWN notification node after it (Telegram, Slack, email, a webhook, whatever channel you already use for other alerts) and wire it to the `message` field this node outputs. See 03-INFRA/deploy/n8n/workflows/README.md.
